description_long: This rifle features a distinctly angular and blocky design, with a long, rectangular barrel and a robust, geometric receiver. The body is uniformly colored in a deep blue, giving it a modern, almost futuristic appearance. The grip is sharply angled and integrated into the lower receiver, while the upper receiver has a stepped, ridged structure that adds to its visual complexity. The barrel is solid and unadorned, with no visible attachments or openings at the muzzle. There are no visible sights, magazine, or stock extensions, suggesting a minimalist or stylized approach. The overall form is compact and streamlined, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is important.
description: A blocky, deep blue rifle with a long rectangular barrel, angular grip, and stepped upper receiver, lacking visible sights or magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, with the angular grip and stepped upper receiver clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rectangular muzzle and the symmetrical, ridged upper receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same angular features and long barrel.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the flat, ridged upper surface and the overall width of the rifle.
